description: Knowledge Lab viewer 重構：對齊 ULV runtime contract，涵蓋 grammar / pattern / usage / vocab support-detail surfaces，並驗證 anchor / panel / selection 互動。

tasks.desc: Align grammar/pattern/usage support-detail viewer with ULV runtime contract (sections, markdown rendering, navigation).
Implement selection state persistence for Pattern Lab (node-scoped) within the Knowledge Lab viewer context.
Implement fail-soft and empty-state behavior for Knowledge Lab viewer (reserved-slot for vocab, missing data handling).
Perform runtime validation of the Knowledge Lab viewer using real content (e.g., A1-01 grammar/pattern links).
Freeze KLab Markdown Profile V1 and align all manual authoring guides.
Plan content normalization (split example_bank into inline chips vs global sentence refs).
